/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/game.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/enemy.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/platform.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/player.c.o -o game  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/librt.a -lm -ldl
